allow: PowerShell(if \(-not \(Test-Path node_modules\)\) { Write-Output "INSTALLING_DEPS"; npm install --no-audit --no-fund --loglevel=error 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 30 } else { Write-Output "DEPS_PRESENT" })
PowerShell(if \(-not \(Test-Path docs\\v2\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path docs\\v2 -Force | Out-Null }; Get-Item docs\\v2 | Select-Object FullName)
PowerShell(git add . 2>&1 | Out-Null; git status --short | Select-Object -First 5; "---"; "files staged: $\(\(git diff --cached --name-only | Measure-Object\).Count\)")
